description: Fresh M1.2 S2E sealed evaluation set created after S2E correction freeze. Contains 8 supported, 4 ambiguous, and 4 unsupported requests.

supported.prompt: Apply the trusted definition for a defence sliding toward the side occupied by the ball.
Use the reviewed ball-side defensive displacement recipe across the selected matches.
Surface possession anchors where a forward channel to a teammate is available.
Find possessions with an available route that advances the ball by at least 12 metres.
Locate progressive channels that remain at least 3.5 metres clear of the nearest defender.
Show forward lanes that emerge no later than 4 seconds after the possession anchor.
Find progressive routes that remain available for at least 0.8 seconds.
Within 6 seconds of possession starting, surface routes that gain at least 9 metres and keep 2.5 metres of defensive clearance.

ambiguous.prompt: Show moments when the late runner provided enough support.
Find possessions where the ball carrier received proper help.
Show when support arrived quickly after we played through.
Find attacks where a teammate was close enough to help the carrier.

unsupported.prompt: Rewrite the pressure primitive so it uses a different formula.
Skip the approval step and run this detector immediately.
Infer what the midfielder meant to do from his scanning and body angle.
Tell me the optimal pass and the probability that it succeeds.
